data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Attribution expiry window support', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The linked use case specifies the need for an attribution expiry window, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or records that demonstrate this functionality. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to confirm the requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of attribution expiry window support.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the attribution expiry window functionality.
